rationale: No-regression pin + fixture-classification lens, all in an absolute /tmp clone pinned to 41d8e8af: go build ./... clean; gofmt -l ./cmd ./internal empty; go vet ./... clean; go test ./internal/panel ./internal/complete ./internal/bead ./cmd/mindspec ./internal/instruct -race all PASS (including the documented pre-existing z4ps flake TestRun_IdleNoBeads, which passed this run). Full go test ./... (42 of 43 packages, excluding internal/harness) all PASS; internal/harness failed only via the documented environmental TestLLM_CompleteFromDoomedWorktree timeout (spawns a real claude CLI, needs network) -- exactly the known non-spec-114 caveat named in the BRIEF, not a regression. Diffed every named test file (panel_decision_test.go, votedecision_test.go, panel_test.go, panel_advisory_test.go, panel_gate_e2e_test.go, panelstate_test.go, cmd/mindspec panel_test.go) against 71398a68: every outcome flip is explicitly commented as an intended Spec-114 R1 change (the 'FOUR intended outcome flips': panel_decision_test threshold-met row, votedecision_test lockstep twin, panelstate_test at_threshold_fresh, cmd/mindspec TestPanelTally_ExitCodeTracksDecision), each paired with a companion all-APPROVE fixture proving the clean-panel Pass/Allow path is unaffected. Renamed tests (TestPanelAdvisory_Passing_WouldPass -> Dissent_WouldBlock) and restated fixtures (approveVerdicts vs new atThresholdWithOneDissentVerdicts helper) are all named and reasoned, not silent. bdcli_test.go/panel_refuted_test.go/refutation_test.go additions are purely additive (fail-closed Merge/GetMetadata, refutation escape) with no skipped tests. git diff --stat confirms these 11 test files are the ONLY test files touched repo-wide -- no unclassified flip lurking elsewhere. No red test, no unexplained fixture outcome change.
